channel.title: Finance
channel.description: This is a randomly ordered feed of the most recent entries from Finance, skipping any feeds with errors.

item.title: Florida Chamber CEO says high-tax states are in a ‘death spiral’ as $4M-an-hour wealth migration accelerates
item.description: If Florida was a stock, the state's Chamber of Commerce CEO Mark Wilson "would be investing everything" in it as he details the Sunshine State's plans...

item.title: Conviction Over Consensus: Why The Biggest Wins Begin With Discomfort
item.description: Why the biggest VC wins start with discomfort. Learn how conviction beats consensus in venture capital and why great bets can come from the most unexp...

item.title: Xbox Is Too Far Down A Rabbit Hole For Huge Changes Under New CEO
item.description: Despite a new CEO, Xbox has so, so many current issues that feel impossible to extract from. How will they do it?

item.title: Trump Organization signs deal for billion-dollar skyscraper on Australia's Gold Coast
item.description: The Trump Organization announced a $1 billion project in Australia this week, building a 91-floor luxury resort and apartments on the Gold Coast.

item.title: Quordle Hints And Answers For Tuesday, February 24
item.description: Looking for some help with today’s Quordle words? Some hints and the answers are right here to give you a hand.

item.title: Mexico’s latest cartel violence prompts fears of ‘narcoterrorism’ in replay 1990s Colombia
item.description: The Mexican army killed the country’s most powerful cartel leader and one of the United States’ most wanted fugitives on Sunday, notching a major vict...

item.title: Northeast Corridor gathers snow at 3 inches an hour as National Weather Service calls traffic ‘nearly impossible’
item.description: Blizzard warnings stretched from Maryland to Maine, while over 5,000 flights were canceled.

item.title: Self-driving taxis hit London, a city with such complex streets that it has a ‘Knowledge’ test that takes cabbies years to pass
item.description: Self-driving taxis are “a solution looking for a problem,” said Steven McNamara, general secretary of the Licensed Taxi Drivers' Association.

item.title: How ‘dumb money’ took over stock markets: $5.4 trillion of retail activity took place in 2025
item.description: All told, money coming into the market from individual investors jumped about 50% from 2023 to early 2025, JPMorgan found.

item.title: Blockbuster ratings start to vindicate NBC’s $7.75 billion bet on the Olympics
item.description: NBC averaged 24 million viewers across its prime afternoon coverage and Primetime in Milan, a 94% improvement over the 2022 Beijing Games.

item.title: Top Sustainable Luxury Destinations For Spring Break
item.description: From Belize’s reef-led resorts to Cancun’s scaled sustainability and Barcelona’s urban policies, discover how modern spring break balances indulgence ...

item.title: This One Gameplay Video Is Marathon’s Biggest Selling Point So Far
item.description: One new video is out that seems to be convincing some skeptical players to try out Marathon. It's the best look at gameplay yet.

item.title: Lowe’s has trounced Home Depot over the past decade. Earnings are due from both.
Economic calendar: December factory orders kick off the week’s data
Stocks retreat after Trump pushes higher tariffs in wake of Supreme Court defeat
Fed’s Waller says March rate decision hinges on jobs report, not Trump’s tariffs
Snowstorm hitting airline stocks as flight cancellations total more than 5,300
Deadliest jobs in America revealed
item.description: The United States Bureau of Labor Statistics reported that there were more than 5,000 deadly work injuries recorded in the nation in 2024.

item.title: Will refunds be issued after Supreme Court ruling on Trump tariffs?
item.description: The Supreme Court struck down President Donald Trump's IEEPA tariffs, which could open the door to billions of dollars in tariff refunds, though the r...

item.title: How should businesses approach tariff refunds?
item.description: Trade experts note that businesses seeking tariff refunds may need to appeal to CBP or the Court of International Trade to get their money back after ...

item.title: Silicon Valley Is Raving About a Made-in-China AI Model
item.description: DeepSeek is called “amazing and impressive” despite working with less-advanced chips.

item.title: Tech, Media & Telecom Roundup: Market Talk
item.description: DeepSeek, SoFi and more in the latest Market Talks covering Technology, Media and Telecom.

item.title: Reid Hoffman Raises $24.6 Million for AI Cancer-Research Startup
item.description: The LinkedIn co-founder is starting Manas AI with “The Emperor of All Maladies” author Siddhartha Mukherjee.

item.title: What to Know About China's DeepSeek AI
item.description: The Chinese upstart says it has trained high-performing AI models cheaply, without using the most advanced chips.

item.title: Can an App Replace a Personal Trainer? I Tested Nearly a Dozen to Find Out
item.description: Apps can add flexibility and freshness to your routine. Just try not to get injured.
